full_text:
Xu You (Ziyuan) 許攸 (子遠)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu You (許攸), styledZiyuan (子遠). Childhood friend of Cao Cao. Betrayed Yuan Shao to Cao, but was killed by Xu Chu. Xu You was affiliated with Yuan Shao and the Wei Kingdom. Xu You lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
